name: @omni-agent-desktop/agent-core
description: TypeScript agent core sidecar for omni-agent-desktop. Runs the agent loop, providers (custom OpenAI-compatible / Anthropic-messages HTTP, Azure Foundry, GitHub Copilot), tools, A2A, scheduler, memory, settings, and secrets. Talks to the Tauri Rust shell over stdio JSON-RPC.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm
